prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约3358→4073→5009→2778→1944名，2023年达到近年峰值后2024年大幅前移至2778名，2025年进一步前移至1944名，近两年累计 前移约3065名，2025年基准位次约1944名；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021–2023年均为143人，2024年缩减至100人，2025年回升至104人；2026年 计划113人，较2025年扩招约8.65%，扩招对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东南大学为985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第15名，近年排名稳定在前 15–17名，属于国内顶尖高校行列；2021年曾因校园安全事件出现偏负面舆情，2023年因师德师风事件出现偏负面舆情；但2026年高考周期内无显著负面舆情事 件；抖音热度总排名第31位，评价为“较热”，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，对报考关注度有正向作用；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达18个，其中A+学科5个 （交通运输工程、土木工程、建筑学、生物医学工程、电子科学与技术），A学科4个，A-学科9个；优势学科覆盖电子信息、计算机、电气、机械等热门工科方向，对考生吸引力 强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程、计算机类等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与东南大学优势学科高度契合；河北省物理类考生2021年约21.6万→2025年约36 .3万，持续增长，2026年估算约36.5万人，考生规模扩大加剧竞争，呈逐年上升趋势，反映整体竞争加剧；东南大学位于江苏省南京市，属长三角核心城市，对河北省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在河北省招生人数占全国总招生比例约2.3%–3.0%，非本地高校，无本地倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1944名、2026年扩招约8.65%使位次后移约101名、河北省物理类考生规模略增、预测2026年物理类最低位次约2075名，区间1867–2283名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 3358 → 4073 → 5009 → 2778 → 1944. In 2023, it reached a recent peak, then significantly moved forward to 2778 in 2024, and further to 1944 in 2025, with a cumulative forward shift of about 3065 positions over the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1944. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 143 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 100 in 2024, and increased to 104 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 113 students, an increase of about 8.65% compared to 2025, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southeast University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 15th, and has been stable within the top 15–17 in recent years, belonging to the top-tier domestic universities. In 2021, there was a negative public opinion incident related to campus safety, and in 2023, a negative incident related to teacher ethics. However, during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, there were no significant negative public opinion incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 31st overall, rated as 'relatively hot', with above-average exposure on short video platforms, positively influencing application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 18 disciplines rated A- or above, including 5 A+ disciplines (Transportation Engineering, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology), 4 A disciplines, and 9 A- disciplines. Its advantageous disciplines cover popular engineering fields such as electronic information, computer science, electrical engineering, and mechanics, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science are consistently highly recommended and align well with Southeast University's advantageous disciplines. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province has grown from approximately 216,000 in 2021 to about 363,000 in 2025, with an estimated 365,000 in 2026. The continuous increase in candidate numbers intensifies competition, reflecting an overall upward trend. Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong regional appeal for Hebei candidates. The university's enrollment in Hebei accounts for about 2.3%–3.0% of its total national enrollment, and it is not a local university, so there is no local bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1944, an approximately 8.65% enrollment increase in 2026 causing a ranking backward shift of about 101 positions, and a slight increase in the number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 2075, with a range of 1867–2283.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1867–2283, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electrical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing) as the main direction, and use Tier 1 majors (Wu Jianxiong Class, Future Robotics, Integrated Circuit, Electronic Information Class, Computer Class) as reach options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 1867), you can prioritize reaching for top Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum rankings for History Category in 2024–2025 were approximately 1322 → 1447, with a shift of about 125 places backward in 2025 compared to 2024, and a baseline ranking of about 1447; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province was 34 students in 2024, 28 in 2025, and 26 in 2026, a reduction of about 7.14% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southeast University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 15th in the Soft Science Ranking, belonging to top-tier universities, and also strongly attractive to History Category candidates; there is no significant negative public opinion during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle; Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot', with overall attention moderately high; Law A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, etc., are related to History Category enrollment majors (Liberal Arts Experimental Class, English, Labor and Social Security), with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category candidates were about 202,000 in 2021 → about 244,000 in 2025, with continuous growth, estimated at about 245,000 in 2026, a significant increase of 28 points, clearly intensifying competition; Nanjing, as a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, has strong appeal to History Category candidates from Hebei.
